_note: Demo Mode static example for /production-sheet. Realistic Leaply lymph-drainage ad scenario.
title: Mom's Neck Hump Reveal
scenario_summary: Adult daughter (35) talks to camera UGC-style about realizing her mother carried a neck hump for 30 years. Cut to mother in soft afternoon kitchen lighting, then to before-after reveal. Closes on UGC of mother walking confidently.
visual_style: UGC + warm afternoon family Authority hybrid

characters.name: Anna
characters.descriptor: the 35-year-old daughter with dark wavy hair in a beige knit sweater, soft natural makeup
characters.passport_prompt: Frontal full-body photo of Anna, vertical 9:16 framing, neutral light-grey backdrop, photorealistic, natural daylight from camera-left, standing straight facing camera, wearing a beige oversized knit sweater over slim dark jeans and white sneakers, dark wavy shoulder-length hair, soft natural makeup, calm friendly expression. Single subject only. No text, no captions, no watermarks, no logos.

characters.name: Mom
characters.descriptor: the 65-year-old mother with silver short hair in cream cardigan, gentle warm eyes
characters.passport_prompt: Frontal full-body photo of Mom, vertical 9:16 framing, neutral light-grey backdrop, photorealistic, natural daylight, standing straight facing camera, wearing a cream wool cardigan over light blue linen blouse and dove-grey trousers and beige loafers, silver short hair softly styled, gentle warm expression with soft smile lines. Single subject only. No text, no captions, no watermarks, no logos.

shots.title: UGC opener — daughter reveal
shots.dialogue: My mom carried this for 30 years before anyone explained why.
shots.image_prompt: Vertical 9:16 framing, photorealistic. Anna stands in a softly lit home hallway, mid-shot from chest up, leaning slightly toward the camera, holding the camera at slight upward angle (selfie style). Soft afternoon window light from camera-right. Beige knit sweater, dark wavy hair. Mouth closed in calm anticipation, eyes locked with the lens. Slightly imperfect framing, handheld feel. Background: blurred living room beyond, warm earth tones. No text, no captions, no watermarks, no logos, no UI elements.
shots.video_prompt: Anna (the 35-year-old daughter with dark wavy hair in a beige knit sweater) holds the camera at selfie distance and steps half a pace toward the lens. She speaks in a confiding, slightly emotional tone, mid-low register, deliberate pacing: "My mom carried this for 30 years before anyone explained why." Camera: handheld with very slight shake, subtle warmth in skin tones. Ambience: warm afternoon home tone, distant clock tick, faint refrigerator hum, no background music. Duration: 5 seconds.
shots.ambience_note: Soft home room tone, distant clock tick, warm afternoon air. No music.
shots.voice_direction: Female, 30-40, US English, confiding intimate tone, mid-low register, soft natural pacing with slight emotional weight on "30 years".

shots.title: Authority cut — mom side profile
shots.image_prompt: Vertical 9:16 framing, photorealistic. Mom stands in a softly lit kitchen, side-profile shot from chest up, her face turned three-quarters away from camera so the back of her neck and upper back curve is clearly visible. Soft afternoon window light from camera-left highlights the curve. Cream cardigan, silver short hair. Gentle wistful expression visible at the edge of her face. Background: warm kitchen with eggshell-white cabinets, soft cream curtains. Composition emphasizes the postural curve at the base of her neck without being clinical. No text, no captions, no watermarks, no logos.
shots.video_prompt: Mom (the 65-year-old mother with silver short hair in cream cardigan) stands still in three-quarter side profile, breathing slowly. Subtle micro-movement: she turns her head a fraction of a degree toward the window, eyes softening. Camera: slow gentle dolly-in from her side, ~10cm closer over 4 seconds, very smooth. No dialogue. Ambience: quiet afternoon kitchen, distant kettle whistle just barely audible, soft tick of a wall clock, no background music. Duration: 4 seconds.
shots.ambience_note: Quiet kitchen room tone, faint kettle, soft wall clock tick. No music. VO will overlay from s1 emotional reveal.
shots.voice_direction: VO-only beat — no on-camera dialogue. Voice direction inherits from s1.

shots.title: Before-after evidence split
shots.image_prompt: Vertical 9:16 framing, photorealistic. Split-screen composition with clear vertical seam down the middle. Left half: Mom side-profile in cooler lighting, shoulders slumped slightly forward, posture rounded, tired expression. Right half: same Mom, same outfit, same framing, but warmer lighting, shoulders rolled back, upright posture, softly smiling. Identical camera angle both halves. Cream cardigan, silver hair. Background: same soft kitchen both sides, just lighting shift. The transformation reads via lighting + posture, no text on screen. No text, no captions, no watermarks, no logos.
shots.video_prompt: Mom (the 65-year-old mother with silver short hair in cream cardigan) split-screen. The seam between left and right halves softly wipes left-to-right over the 4 seconds, revealing the right half (transformed posture) as the dominant frame. No motion of subject — only the split-line itself transitions. No dialogue. Ambience: subtle whoosh as transition moves, soft kitchen room tone underneath, no background music. Duration: 4 seconds.
shots.ambience_note: Subtle whoosh on the split transition, kitchen room tone bed. No music.
shots.voice_direction: VO-only. Editor will overlay calm explanatory line about lymph circulation here in AE.
shots.editor_overlay_note: Add lower-third typography in AE: small white animated text reveal explaining lymph mechanism. Burned-in word-by-word per Daria's subtitle spec. Do NOT bake into AI render.

shots.title: UGC daughter close — payoff
shots.image_prompt: Vertical 9:16 framing, photorealistic. Anna in the same softly lit home hallway as s1, slightly tighter close-up from shoulders up. She's just smiled — the smile is fading into something more emotional. Soft afternoon window light from camera-right, eyes slightly glassy with warmth. Beige knit sweater. Handheld selfie angle, slightly tilted, intimate. Background: warm earth-toned blur. No text, no captions, no watermarks, no logos.
shots.video_prompt: Anna (the 35-year-old daughter with dark wavy hair in a beige knit sweater) holds the camera close, mouth opens softly to speak. She delivers the line with quiet emotional weight, slight smile fading into vulnerability, mid-low register: "Yesterday she stopped wearing scarves." Camera: handheld, very slight push-in over 4 seconds. Ambience: soft home tone, faint outdoor birds through window, no background music. Duration: 4 seconds.
shots.ambience_note: Soft home tone, faint outdoor birds through window, gentle warm air. No music.
shots.voice_direction: Female, 30-40, US English, soft emotional payoff, mid-low register, deliberate pause before "scarves", slight vulnerability.
shots.editor_overlay_note: End-card / CTA card follows this shot in AE (NOT generated by AI). Brand CTA reveal here.

voice_casting_note: ElevenLabs: Anna — warm female voice ID 'Rachel' or similar (30-40, soft emotional register). Mom — VO-only via Anna (no second voice cast). Lock voice IDs in casting sheet: tag each generation with character name + shot ID.
music_cue_note: No music in AI render. In AE, add gentle warm piano underscore starting at s2 (very low, feels like nostalgia), build subtly through s3 evidence split, lift to soft swell at s4 payoff. No music at s1 — pure UGC silence with ambience.
subtitle_spec: Burned-in word-by-word, white caps + yellow keyword highlight on '30 years', '30 years', 'scarves'. Tahoma bold. Add in AE post-render.
